// Diagnostic script for S16 emission node label debugging
(function() {
  console.log("=== S16 Emission Label Diagnostic Script Loaded ===");
  console.log("This will monitor formatNodeLabel() calls and log emission node data");
  
  // Store original formatNodeLabel function
  const sankeyInstance = window.TEUI?.sect16?.sankeyInstance;
  if (!sankeyInstance) {
    console.error("Sankey instance not found. Please activate the Sankey first.");
    return;
  }
  
  const originalFormatNodeLabel = sankeyInstance.formatNodeLabel.bind(sankeyInstance);
  let callCounter = 0;
  
  // Wrap formatNodeLabel with diagnostic logging
  sankeyInstance.formatNodeLabel = function(node) {
    callCounter++;
    
    if (node.name && node.name.toLowerCase().includes("emissions")) {
      const targetLinks = node.targetLinks || [];
      const linkValues = targetLinks.map(link => ({
        source: typeof link.source === 'object' ? link.source.name : link.source,
        target: typeof link.target === 'object' ? link.target.name : link.target,
        value: link.value,
        isEmissions: link.isEmissions
      }));
      
      const totalEmissionsInGrams = targetLinks.reduce((sum, link) => sum + link.value, 0);
      const kgValue = totalEmissionsInGrams / 1000;
      
      console.group(`📊 [Call #${callCounter}] formatNodeLabel: ${node.name}`);
      console.log("Target Links Count:", targetLinks.length);
      console.log("Target Links Details:", linkValues);
      console.log("Total Emissions (grams):", totalEmissionsInGrams);
      console.log("Total Emissions (kg):", kgValue);
      console.log("Node object:", {
        name: node.name,
        value: node.value,
        x0: node.x0,
        sourceLinks: node.sourceLinks?.length || 0,
        targetLinks: node.targetLinks?.length || 0
      });
      console.groupEnd();
    }
    
    // Call original function
    return originalFormatNodeLabel(node);
  };
  
  console.log("✅ Diagnostic wrapper installed on formatNodeLabel()");
  console.log("Now activate emissions mode and watch the console output.");
  console.log("To restore original function, run: window.TEUI.sect16.sankeyInstance.formatNodeLabel = " + originalFormatNodeLabel);
  
  // Store restore function
  window._restoreFormatNodeLabel = function() {
    window.TEUI.sect16.sankeyInstance.formatNodeLabel = originalFormatNodeLabel;
    console.log("✅ Original formatNodeLabel restored");
  };
  console.log("To restore, call: _restoreFormatNodeLabel()");
})();
